name: @verifiable-content-demo/bible-ontology
description: Bible ontology explorer: a PROV-O graph (Agent/Activity/Entity) of the Bible (from Theographic, CC-BY-SA) over DUL + W3C ORG + GeoSPARQL + aps: skills + gc: lower vocab, used to validate the Global Church Ontology against PROV-O and real Bible usage.
